summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Whalers on the Moon whale transaction tracker. All functionality working perfectly with 100% success rate. Previous transaction duplication bug has been completely resolved. Backend APIs and frontend UI integration working flawlessly.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (100% success - 19/19 tests passed)
Backend API /api/subscribe saves email and handles duplicates correctly
Network filtering: Solana (8 transactions), Base (6 transactions)
Terminal theme implementation (black background, green text)
ASCII whale header and app title display
Stats bar shows correct values: Total Volume $22,245,483, Largest Move $3,250,813, Solana TXS=8, Base TXS=6
Transaction list displays exactly 14 rows using .transaction-row class
Network filter tabs work perfectly: ALL (14), SOLANA (8), BASE (6)
Subscribe modal opens, accepts email, shows success message
Explorer links point to correct URLs (solscan.io for Solana, basescan.org for Base)
Explorer links open in new tab (target=_blank)
No error messages or console errors found
Previous transaction duplication bug completely resolved
